sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n54356" key="katale/gw1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταλέγω</orth> (A), <sense id="n54356.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lay down</tr_>; <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καταλέχομαι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
